emotional_tone: Technical precision, Pro-Audio Studio, Control, Artistry, DAWs like Izotope RX / Splice

hierarchy.labels: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-mono font-bold text-[#A1A1A6]

rules: Avoid pure black (#000000); use deep obsidian (#0A0A0A) tinted slightly.
Use Signal Red sparingly for recording/alerts only.
Volt Blue or Amber strictly for audio meters.
DO NOT USE PURPLE OR TEAL GRADIENTS.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind standard with generous spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12). Containers with borders must use internal padding.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Control Room Grid for Dashboard / Studio elements. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Border-collapse style layout. Expose the skeleton. 1px solid strokes instead of soft shadows.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align for dense audio data and meters. Center-align only for empty states or hero headers.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold rounded-none hover:bg-neutral-200 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white bg-transparent rounded-none hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors
buttons.recording: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white rounded-none hover:bg-red-400 animate-pulse font-mono uppercase tracking-widest
buttons.destructive: bg-transparent border border-[#FF3B30]/50 text-[#FF3B30] hover:bg-[#FF3B30] hover:text-white rounded-none transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#141414] border border-white/10 rounded-none text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none

custom_elements.audio_meter: Vertical flex layout with green, yellow, red gradient fill based on input volume. Use 1px gap between blocks for an LED console look.
custom_elements.waveform: Canvas or SVG based rendering. Use #007AFF for processed audio, #FF3B30 for active recording, and #A1A1A6 for empty state tracks.

shadcn_rules: Remove all rounded corners (border-radius) to match brutalist style (e.g., rounded-none everywhere).
Do NOT use HTML inputs for calendar/dropdowns. Use Shadcn + customize.
Use Sonner for toast, customized to brutalist dark mode.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit text and bg color change. e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast ring focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:outline-none.

animations.recording_pulse: Slow ease-in-out pulse for active recording state.

hero_microphone.description: Dark, moody professional studio microphone for landing or dashboard hero.

audio_waveform.description: Abstract digital waveform glitch art for model training empty states.

audio_interface.description: Red audio interface for the API/Export section context.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure min 4.5:1 for body, 3:1 for large text. Use Text Shadow over waveforms if needed.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='record-take-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install JetBrains Mono and Clash Display from Google Fonts or local font face. Map them in Tailwind config.
All application text, copy, and instructions MUST be in Spanish.
Do NOT use rounded corners (remove rounded-* classes from Shadcn components). Apply rounded-none globally for brutalist/industrial sharp edges.
Build the dashboard using the Control Room Grid protocol (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3) with tight gaps.
For the Guided Voice Training Studio, prioritize real-time waveform elements. Provide dummy visualizer using Canvas/SVG or CSS animations if real audio processing isn't hooked up.
Implement the 'Audio Cleaner' and 'Training Package Export' logic/UI as described in the problem statement.
Never use purple or teal gradients.
Ensure all buttons, tabs, forms, and inputs have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for pure layout but rely on Shadcn/ui (customized to brutalism) for all interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Progress).
